summary: Phase 3 testing: Subscription plan enforcement, branch limits, feature flag management, multi-tenancy isolation. Fixed critical branch limit multi-tenancy bug. 46 backend tests pass (100%). All UI scenarios verified via Playwright for basic/standard/pro/founders plans.

critical_bug_fixed.bug: Branch limit check used global count `db.branches.count_documents({'active': True})` instead of org-scoped count. This counted ALL branches across ALL organizations, causing incorrect limit enforcement in multi-tenant environment.
critical_bug_fixed.fix: Changed to `db.branches.count_documents({'organization_id': org_id, 'active': True})` to scope count to the current organization only.
critical_bug_fixed.impact: Without this fix: Org A's branch creation would fail because Org B's branches counted against Org A's limit. Multi-tenant isolation was broken.

minor.issue: Newly created orgs (without branches via setup wizard) get 403 errors on dashboard endpoint calls. Standard plan org test shows console 403 errors. Dashboard still renders but some widgets may be empty.
minor.priority: LOW — expected behavior for orgs without completed setup wizard

issues: HTML hydration warning: <span> as child of <th>/<tr>/<tbody> in competitor comparison table. Console reports 'In HTML, %s cannot be a child of <%s>' — causes hydration errors. Not a functional bug but bad practice.

feature_verification.landing_page: PASS — Loads at /, shows Basic/Standard/Pro plan cards, 14-day trial messaging
feature_verification.registration: PASS — POST /api/organizations/register creates trial org with 14-day trial, all Pro features, max_branches=5
feature_verification.trial_plan: PASS — auth/me returns plan=trial, effective_plan=trial, features include all Pro flags, max_branches=5
feature_verification.basic_plan_nav_filtering: PASS — 9 premium nav items hidden (Purchase Orders, Pay Supplier, Suppliers, Employees, Fund Mgmt, Branch Transfers, Audit Center, Reports, Permissions). Core items (Dashboard, Branches, Products, Inventory, Sales, Customers) remain visible
feature_verification.branch_limit_ui: PASS — BranchesPage shows (2/1 used) counter in red, amber warning banner ('Branch limit reached — Your Basic plan allows 1 branch'), Add Branch button disabled
feature_verification.branch_limit_backend: PASS — POST /api/branches returns 400 with informative error when basic plan org is at limit. Error includes plan name and limit info
feature_verification.multi_tenancy_isolation: PASS (after fix) — branch count check is now org-scoped. Before fix: counted all 10 branches globally (8 founders + 2 basic) against basic's limit=1. After fix: counts only this org's 2 branches vs limit=1
feature_verification.founders_unlimited_branches: PASS — Founders plan max_branches=0, Add Branch always enabled, Branches page shows '(Unlimited)' in green, no warning banner
feature_verification.founders_all_features: PASS — All 9 premium nav items visible for founders plan
feature_verification.standard_plan_features: PASS — Purchase Orders, Pay Supplier, Suppliers, Employees, Fund Mgmt, Branch Transfers, Audit Center, Reports visible. Permissions (granular_permissions=False) correctly hidden
feature_verification.pro_plan_features: PASS — All premium features enabled including granular_permissions, full_audit_center, repack_pricing, transaction_verify
feature_verification.subscription_auto_expiry_30_days: PASS — When admin activates basic/standard/pro plan, subscription_expires_at auto-set 30 days from now
feature_verification.feature_flag_toggle_off: PASS — Admin toggles purchase_orders OFF for standard plan → standard user's auth/me immediately returns features.purchase_orders=false → Purchase Orders nav item hidden on page refresh
feature_verification.feature_flag_toggle_on: PASS — Admin restores purchase_orders ON for standard plan → standard user's nav immediately shows Purchase Orders again on refresh
feature_verification.admin_portal_login: PASS — /admin shows Platform Administration portal (not regular login). Email+password step works, TOTP 6-digit code step appears with Google Authenticator instructions
feature_verification.superadmin_panel: PASS — /superadmin shows 4 KPI cards (Total Orgs, Active, Trial, Founders), Plan Breakdown with bars, Organizations tab with 4 orgs, Feature Flags tab with toggle UI

action_items: FIXED: Multi-tenancy branch count bug in /app/backend/routes/branches.py (now uses organization_id filter)
MINOR: Fix HTML hydration warning in LandingPage.js compare table — <span> wrapper around <th>/<tr> tags in competitor comparison section (LandingPage.js around line 268-289)

INFO: limittest@testmail.com has 2 branches despite being on Basic plan (max 1). These were created before limit enforcement was added. Existing over-limit branches are preserved but new ones are blocked.
OPTIONAL: Dashboard 403 errors for newly created orgs without setup wizard completed — consider returning empty state instead of 403
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/branches.py (fixed org-scoped branch count in limit enforcement)

seed_data_creation: Created test_std_wyzk33@testmail.com (standard plan) and test_pro_* (pro plan) orgs for testing. Trial org test_eeey18@testmail.com also created during backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 complete. Fixed critical multi-tenancy bug: branch limit check now org-scoped (was global). 46 backend tests all pass. Verified: (1) Basic plan — all premium nav items hidden, branches page shows limit counter/warning/disabled button; (2) Standard plan — correct features visible, feature flags toggle live; (3) Pro plan — all features, max 5 branches, 30-day auto expiry; (4) Founders plan — unlimited, no expiry, all features; (5) Trial plan — all Pro features, max 5 branches, 14-day expiry; (6) Admin portal /admin shows TOTP step; (7) /superadmin panel loads with org management + feature flags UI. Remaining unverified: full super admin panel feature flag toggle via UI (TOTP prevents login in automation), but API toggle was verified live. Test orgs created: standard (test_std_wyzk33@testmail.com), pro and trial variants.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: branches.py POST / — branch count was global (all orgs), not per-org. This is a critical multi-tenancy isolation bug. Fixed to use organization_id filter.

organizations.py get_live_feature_flags(): 'trial' and 'founders' always mirror 'pro' flags (hardcoded). This means if admin changes pro flags, trial/founders change too. Intentional design but worth documenting.

superadmin.py update_subscription(): Auto-sets subscription_expires_at to 30 days only if not already set (line 156-159). If admin re-activates a plan that already has an expiry, the expiry is NOT reset. Consider whether this is correct behavior.

Layout.js filteredNav: Feature flag check uses `features[item.featureFlag] === false` (strict false). If DB has null/undefined for a flag, it won't be hidden. This is safe for known plans but could be a gap if a new flag is added without a DB value.
LandingPage.js: HTML hydration error from <span> wrapping table children (<th>, <tr>, <tbody> with .map()). Fix: use React Fragment or ensure spans don't appear inside table structure.

rca_of_bug_fixed.bug: Branch limit enforcement not isolating by organization
rca_of_bug_fixed.root_cause: branches.py POST / checked `db.branches.count_documents({'active': True})` which returns ALL active branches across ALL organizations in the shared `branches` collection. The `db` context is org-scoped at the application level, but `count_documents` without a filter returns all records that happen to be in the currently set org context — however the implementation was missing the `organization_id` field in the query.
rca_of_bug_fixed.reproduction: 1. Login as Basic plan org (max_branches=1). 2. POST /api/branches. 3. If global count >= 1 (always true when any org has branches), returns 400 even if this specific org has 0 branches.
rca_of_bug_fixed.fix: Added `organization_id: org_id` to the count_documents query to scope it to the current org only
rca_of_bug_fixed.verification: Backend test test_multi_tenancy_branch_count_isolation passes. Founders org has 8 branches; basic org's limit check correctly ignores founders' branches.
